window_summary: This window tracks the recent ToolJet/ToolJet release stream across LTS and beta releases, covering new features like AI Module Builder, marketplace plugins, and various fixes and enhancements.

chunks.title: v3.20.152-lts
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ToolJet/ToolJet
Release: v3.20.152-lts
Tag: v3.20.152-lts; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-29T16:12:23Z; created_at: 2026-04-29T15:11:07Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* refactor: simplify border color handling in ButtonColumnAdapter component by @nakulnagargade in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16049
* fix: ButtonGroupV2 on button delete merging back default values by @shaurya-sharma064 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16202
* Fix: resolve cellValue, rowData, and ListView siblings in CodeHinter preview by @kavinvenkatachalam in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/15892
* feat: integrate form validation context into various widgets by @nakulnagargade in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16083
* Migration for collapseOnHide toggle by @shaurya-sharma064 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16196
* Fixed accordion push/pull by @shaurya-sharma064 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16235
* BigQuery Improvements by @rudeUltra in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16035
* Feature : Snowflake plugin improvements by @ganesh8056 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/15918
* Hotfix: Update primary key column variable names for PostgreSQL and MySQL by @ganesh8056 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16072
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/compare/v3.20.151-lts...v3.20.152-lts
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ToolJet/ToolJet release v3.20.152-lts, the release includes refactoring of border color handling in ButtonColumnAdapter, a fix for ButtonGroupV2 button delete merging default values, resolution of cellValue, rowData, and ListView siblings in CodeHinter preview, integration of form validation context into various widgets, migration for collapseOnHide toggle, fixes for accordion push/pull, BigQuery improvements, Snowflake plugin improvements, and a hotfix to update primary key column variable names for PostgreSQL and MySQL.

chunks.title: v3.21.28-beta
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ToolJet/ToolJet
Release: v3.21.28-beta
Tag: v3.21.28-beta; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-05-02T16:45:17Z; created_at: 2026-05-02T16:42:09Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* feat: add data migration to seed push-modules branch for existing modules by @Pratush613 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16012
* Fix: Module version pinning, save/promote/release gates, #15992 by @akshaysasidrn in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16010
* Remove redundant boxShadow from universalProps and align configs by @johnsoncherian in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16033
* Update platform workflow for git sync test cases config by @ajith-k-v in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16025
* Git sync automation test cases by @ajith-k-v in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16020
* Fix/module version rename ref update by @Pratush613 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16034
* Fix: use sessionStorage for active branch to enable per-tab branch isolation by @RndmCodeGuy20 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16038
* Fix: Import from git fixes by @shah21 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16032
* Fix: Imported apps don't render modules on non-default branches by @akshaysasidrn in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16048
* Fix: Import from git — unrelated datasources by @shah21 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16052
* Fix: Revert module version naming and fix datasource import scope by @shah21 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16053
* Fix: preserve marketplace plugin queries on git app import by @shah21 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16058
* Fix: module hydration drops all versions when git files are branch-type by @akshaysasidrn in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16055
* Fix: Create DSVO row per environment on data source pull by @shah21 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16071
* Fix: Preserve module version pin across branches + readability refactor by @akshaysasidrn in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16070
* Fix/export stub access issue by @Pratush613 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16066
* Fix: Set default properties for new pages and modules initialization by @devanshu052000 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16065
* Fix: Set default 'disabled' and 'hidden' properties for new app pages by @devanshu052000 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16076
* Fix: ensure atomic DS creation and improve git app import reliability by @shah21 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16067
* Fix: module version dropdown + gate org-scoping by @akshaysasidrn in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16077
* test apis by @shah21 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16085
* Fix: propagate branch_id on data-source invoke for branch-scoped globals by @akshaysasidrn in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16086
* fix: remove app_version_id from data_source_versions — use default DS… by @Pratush613 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16111
* Fixed get app data command issue by @YuktiGoyal02 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16112
* Added CollapseOnHide to Image component by @shaurya-sharma064 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16088
* chore: bump version to 3.20.151-lts across all components by @johnsoncherian in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16211
* refactor: simplify border color handling in ButtonColumnAdapter component by @nakulnagargade in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16049
* Fix: Change tag structure & version pull on app rename [Base] by @parthy007 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16138
* Change module version name to module_reference_id by @shah21 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16216
* Feat: add is_dummy flag to data sources and update related component for better handling of undefined data sources by @vjaris42 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16197
* fix: ButtonGroupV2 on button delete merging back default va...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ToolJet/ToolJet release v3.21.28-beta, the release includes a data migration to seed push-modules branch for existing modules, fixes for module version pinning, save/promote/release gates, removal of redundant boxShadow from universalProps, updates to platform workflow for git sync test cases, git sync automation test cases, fix for module version rename ref update, use of sessionStorage for active branch to enable per-tab branch isolation, fixes for import from git including imported apps not rendering modules on non-default branches, unrelated datasources, revert of module version naming and fix datasource import scope, preservation of marketplace plugin queries on git app import, fix for module hydration dropping all versions when git files are branch-type, creation of DSVO row per environment on data source pull, preservation of module version pin across branches, fix for export stub access issue, setting default properties for new pages and modules initialization, setting default 'disabled' and 'hidden' properties for new app pages, ensuring atomic DS creation and improving git app import reliability, fix for module version dropdown and gate org-scoping, test apis, propagation of branch_id on data-source invoke for branch-scoped globals, removal of app_version_id from data_source_versions, fix for get app data command issue, addition of CollapseOnHide to Image component, version bump to 3.20.151-lts, refactoring of border color handling in ButtonColumnAdapter, change of tag structure and version pull on app rename, change of module version name to module_reference_id, addition of is_dummy flag to data sources, and fix for ButtonGroupV2 button delete merging default values.

chunks.title: v3.20.154-lts
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ToolJet/ToolJet
Release: v3.20.154-lts
Tag: v3.20.154-lts; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-04T13:19:29Z; created_at: 2026-05-04T13:17:11Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
### 🌟 Enhancements
* Improved Event Manager UI/UX: Introduced Rocket Popover UI, two-line row layouts, and event duplication support by @nithindavid in [#16016](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16016)
* Added `max limit` property to Multi-select V2 by @shaurya-sharma064 in [#16250](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16250)
* Improved dynamic height handling by incorporating `moduleId` by @shaurya-sharma064 in [#16265](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16265)
* Applied design review updates for Radio Button and Button Group V2 by @devanshu052000 in [#15777](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/15777)
### 🛠️ Fixes
* Fixed AppCanvas issue to prevent component drops into module-instance containers by @shaurya-sharma064 in [#16214](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16214)
* Enabled `lineWrapping` in CodeEditor to resolve multi-row selection issues by @shaurya-sharma064 in [#16286](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16286)
Full Changelog: https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/compare/v3.20.153-lts...v3.20.154-lts
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ToolJet/ToolJet release v3.20.154-lts, the release includes enhancements such as improved Event Manager UI/UX with Rocket Popover UI, two-line row layouts, and event duplication support; addition of max limit property to Multi-select V2; improved dynamic height handling by incorporating moduleId; and design review updates for Radio Button and Button Group V2. Fixes include preventing component drops into module-instance containers on AppCanvas and enabling lineWrapping in CodeEditor to resolve multi-row selection issues.

chunks.title: v3.20.155-lts
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ToolJet/ToolJet
Release: v3.20.155-lts
Tag: v3.20.155-lts; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-07T16:31:07Z; created_at: 2026-05-07T16:28:50Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
### 🚀 Features
* Added OAuth support to Dynamic Forms by @rudeUltra in [#16306](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16306)
* Introduced a new Context Window widget by @vavinash992 in [#16297](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16297)
* Added a global disable toggle for queries by @shaurya-sharma064 in [#16087](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16087)
* Added the ability to view and edit datasource details directly within the datasource selection widget by @NishidhJain in [#16307](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16307)
### 🌟 Enhancements
* Added padding toggle support for ModuleViewer via wrapper styles by @shaurya-sharma064 in [#16302](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16302)
* Added support for static indices during dependency graph generation by @shaurya-sharma064 in [#16213](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16213)
* Added S3 bucket name configuration to the settings page by @ganesh8056 in [#16251](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16251)
### 🛠️ Fixes
* Fixed SSO Group Sync issue where End-Users were not correctly elevated to Builders by @RndmCodeGuy20 in [#15838](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/15838)
* Fixed Table issues: resolved drag-resize persistence, cleared Number cells to null in changeSets, and fixed paste seed leaks by @shaurya-sharma064 in [#16312](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16312), [#16288](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16288)
* Fixed CheckboxV2 mandatory indicator visibility when checked by @shaurya-sharma064 in [#16292](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16292)
* Resolved Datepicker portal regression within the module canvas by @shaurya-sharma064 in [#16323](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16323)
### 🧪 Specs
* Fixed BigQuery service account flow specifications by @Srimanitejas123 in [#16325](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16325)
Full Changelog: https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/compare/v3.20.154-lts...v3.20.155-lts
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ToolJet/ToolJet release v3.20.155-lts, the release includes features such as OAuth support for Dynamic Forms, a new Context Window widget, a global disable toggle for queries, and the ability to view and edit datasource details directly within the datasource selection widget. Enhancements include padding toggle support for ModuleViewer via wrapper styles, support for static indices during dependency graph generation, and S3 bucket name configuration on the settings page. Fixes include resolving SSO Group Sync issue where End-Users were not correctly elevated to Builders, fixing Table issues (drag-resize persistence, clearing Number cells to null in changeSets, and paste seed leaks), fixing CheckboxV2 mandatory indicator visibility when checked, and resolving Datepicker portal regression within the module canvas. Specs include fixing BigQuery service account flow specifications.

## What's Changed
* fix(dynamic-height): reflow on show for hidden subtrees via ResizeObserver by @shaurya-sharma064 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16280
* Fix module scrolling behaviour in viewer and editor by @nakulnagargade in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16131
* fix: Tabs - allow setTabVisibility to reveal initially hidden tab by @shaurya-sharma064 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16316
* Fix for list tables by @abhijeet760 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16324
* Feature: Import/Export Modules External API by @RndmCodeGuy20 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16300
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/compare/v3.20.155-lts...v3.20.156-lts
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ToolJet/ToolJet release v3.20.156-lts, the release includes a fix for dynamic-height reflow on show for hidden subtrees via ResizeObserver, a fix for module scrolling behaviour in viewer and editor, a fix for Tabs to allow setTabVisibility to reveal initially hidden tab, a fix for list tables, and a feature for Import/Export Modules External API.

* Fix: Elevate End-User to Builder in SSO Group Sync by @RndmCodeGuy20 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/15838
* chore: update version to 3.20.155-lts across all components by @johnsoncherian in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16338

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/co...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ToolJet/ToolJet release v3.21.30-beta, the release includes a fix for CodeEditor to enable lineWrapping for correct multi-row selection, design review changes for Radio button and Button Group V2, a design revamp for EventManager with Rocket Popover, two-line rows, and duplicate functionality, addition of moduleId to dynamic height, version update to 3.20.154-lts across all components, a fix for DS Save Issue on main branch, a fix for Table to clear Number cell to null in changeSet, addition of data-cy attributes for gitsync components, a fix for CheckboxV2 to keep mandatory * indicator visible when checked, support for static index while creating dependency graph, support for padding toggle in ModuleViewer by passing styles to wrapper, a fix for Table drag resize persistence and paste seed leak, a feature to add view datasource details functionality in datasource selection widget, a fix for Datepicker portal regression inside module canvas, a new Context Window widget, addition of disable toggle to queries, addition of Oauth to Dynamic Form, fixing bigquery spec for service account flow, addition of S3 bucket name to configuration page, a fix to elevate End-User to Builder in SSO Group Sync, version update to 3.20.155-lts across all components, a fix for dynamic-height reflow on show for hidden subtrees via ResizeObserver, addition of Cypress test cases for gitsync functionality, a fix for module scrolling behavior in viewer and editor, a fix for Tabs to allow setTabVisibility to reveal initially hidden tab, a fix for list tables, a feature for Import/Export Modules External API, enhancement of background processor with transaction management and lifecycle callbacks, a feature for Save Version External API, and a fix for permission key logic in defineAppVersionAbility function.

chunks.title: v3.20.157-lts
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ToolJet/ToolJet
Release: v3.20.157-lts
Tag: v3.20.157-lts; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-13T03:51:23Z; created_at: 2026-05-13T03:46:38Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
### 🚀 Features
* Added QuickBooks Online marketplace plugin support by @akshaysasidrn in [#15903](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/15903)
* Added search functionality for gRPC methods and service names by @ganesh8056 in [#16373](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16373)
### 🌟 Enhancements
* Updated Snowflake plugin manifest to utilize the new form generator by @ganesh8056 in [#16365](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16365)
* Improved query execution logic so that callback function returns no longer override the main query run by @shaurya-sharma064 in [#15544](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/15544)
### 🛠️ Fixes
* Fixed issue in Event Manager where name input would replay characters on typing pause by @nithindavid in [#16308](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16308)
* Fixed module scoping by threading `moduleId` through widget event actions by @shaurya-sharma064 in [#16360](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16360)
* Resolved Inspector crash caused by malformed style values by @shaurya-sharma064 in [#16333](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16333)
* Fixed Textarea dynamic-height behavior by setting default rows to 1 to honor heights below the browser's 2-row floor by @shaurya-sharma064 in [#16380](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16380)
* Applied ListView row scope to `validateWidget` for accurate validation handling by @shaurya-sharma064 in [#16262](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16262)
Full Changelog: https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/compare/v3.20.156-lts...v3.20.157-lts
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ToolJet/ToolJet release v3.20.157-lts, the release includes features such as QuickBooks Online marketplace plugin support and search functionality for gRPC methods and service names. Enhancements include updating the Snowflake plugin manifest to utilize the new form generator and improving query execution logic so that callback function returns no longer override the main query run. Fixes include resolving an issue in Event Manager where name input would replay characters on typing pause, fixing module scoping by threading moduleId through widget event actions, resolving an Inspector crash caused by malformed style values, fixing Textarea dynamic-height behavior by setting default rows to 1, and applying ListView row scope to validateWidget for accurate validation handling.

chunks.title: v3.21.32-beta
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ToolJet/ToolJet
Release: v3.21.32-beta
Tag: v3.21.32-beta; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-05-13T13:12:32Z; created_at: 2026-05-13T13:04:38Z
Release notes:
### 🚀 Features
- Add QuickBooks Online marketplace plugin in [#15903](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/15903) by @rudeUltra @akshaysasidrn
- Add Intercom marketplace plugin in [#15953](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/15953) by @rudeUltra @akshaysasidrn
- Add gRPC method and service name search functionality in [#16373](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16373) by @ganesh8056
- Save Button on Google Sheets data source in [#16395](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16395) by @rudeUltra
### 🌟 Enhancements
- Snowflake plugin manifest modified to use new form generator in [#16365](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16365) by @ganesh8056
- Encrypted field check in DynamicForm same as v2 in [#16404](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16404) by @rudeUltra
### 🛠️ Fixes
- Modules — thread `moduleId` through widget event actions in [#16360](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16360) by @shaurya-sharma064
- Event manager name input replays chars on typing pause in [#16308](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16308) by @nithindavid
- Inspector — prevent crash on malformed style values in [#16333](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16333) by @shaurya-sharma064
- Textarea — set `rows=1` so dynamic-height widgets honor configured heights below browser's 2-row scrollHeight floor in [#16380](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16380) by @shaurya-sharma064
- Callback functions return no longer overrides main query run in [#15544](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/15544) by @shaurya-sharma064
- Apply listview row scope to `validateWidget` in [#16262](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16262) by @shaurya-sharma064
- Module — embedded canvas inherits host app background in [#16389](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16389) by @shaurya-sharma064
### ⏱️ Performance updates
- Performance optimisations and general fixes in [#16339](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16339) by @akshaysasidrn @shah21 @vjaris42
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ToolJet/ToolJet release v3.21.32-beta, the release includes features such as adding QuickBooks Online marketplace plugin, adding Intercom marketplace plugin, adding gRPC method and service name search functionality, and adding a Save Button on Google Sheets data source. Enhancements include modifying the Snowflake plugin manifest to use the new form generator and adding encrypted field check in DynamicForm same as v2. Fixes include threading moduleId through widget event actions for modules, fixing event manager name input replaying chars on typing pause, preventing Inspector crash on malformed style values, setting rows=1 for Textarea dynamic-height widgets, ensuring callback functions return no longer overrides main query run, applying listview row scope to validateWidget, and making module embedded canvas inherit host app background. Performance updates include performance optimisations and general fixes.

chunks.title: v3.20.159-lts
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ToolJet/ToolJet
Release: v3.20.159-lts
Tag: v3.20.159-lts; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-14T14:34:21Z; created_at: 2026-05-14T14:30:18Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
### 🚀 Features
* Added AI datasource support for MySQL and MSSQL by @swathihameed in [#16403](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16403)
* Updated Module Builder logo popup menu navigation to display a 'Go back to modules' action instead of 'Go back to apps' by @NishidhJain in [#16406](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16406)
### 🌟 Enhancements
* Updated AppCanvas widget behavior to ensure hidden widgets completely collapse to 0px per the latest design specifications by @shaurya-sharma064 in [#16361](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16361)
### 🛠️ Fixes
* Disabled z-index override to resolve popover rendering and layout styling bugs in Firefox by @manishkushare in [#16412](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16412)
Full Changelog: https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/compare/v3.20.158-lts...v3.20.159-lts
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ToolJet/ToolJet release v3.20.159-lts, the release includes features such as AI datasource support for MySQL and MSSQL and updating the Module Builder logo popup menu navigation to display a 'Go back to modules' action instead of 'Go back to apps'. Enhancements include updating AppCanvas widget behavior to ensure hidden widgets completely collapse to 0px per the latest design specifications. Fixes include disabling z-index override to resolve popover rendering and layout styling bugs in Firefox.

Repository: ToolJet/ToolJet

Tag: v3.20.168-lts; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-28T17:24:18Z; created_at: 2026-05-28T17:22:27Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
### 🚀 Features
* Phased development support: Introduced mechanisms to break down large feature requirements into development phases by @NishidhJain in [#16506](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16506)
* Added the `snapshot_groups` variable to Packer infrastructure configuration by @adishM98 in [#16588](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16588)
### 🛠️ Fixes
* Fixed coordinate space logic for moveable Modals to ensure precise drag-and-drop placement by @nakulnagargade in [#16437](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16437)
* Implemented parent remapping handling during version copying within the application creator service by @nakulnagargade in [#16576](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16576)
Full Changelog: https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/compare/v3.20.167-lts...v3.20.168-lts
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ToolJet/ToolJet release v3.20.168-lts, the release includes features for phased development support to break down large feature requirements into development phases and adding the snapshot_groups variable to Packer infrastructure configuration. Fixes include fixing coordinate space logic for moveable Modals to ensure precise drag-and-drop placement and implementing parent remapping handling during version copying within the application creator service.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ToolJet/ToolJet
Release: v3.21.38-beta
Tag: v3.21.38-beta; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-05-31T17:26:35Z; created_at: 2026-05-31T17:22:22Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* add 'Auto' sorting option and update setSort logic to handle it by @manishkushare in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16468
* Fixes on table sort functionality by @manishkushare in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16544
* Feature: Custom header click events and programmatic sorting on Table by @nithindavid in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16319
* Fix quickbooks bug by @rudeUltra in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16392
* Fix queries not running inside modules successfully on released apps by @nakulnagargade in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16545
* chore: update version to 3.20.166-lts across all components by @johnsoncherian in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16575
* fix: dynamic-height - treat offsetHeight=0 as not measurable on show by @shaurya-sharma064 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16570
* Fix: enhance end-user and builder access to modules and data queries by @RndmCodeGuy20 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16374
* Feat/support for gemini by @vavinash992 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16424
* feat: add snapshot_groups variable to Packer configuration by @adishM98 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16588
* feat: implement parent remapping for version copying in create service by @nakulnagargade in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16576
* Fix Modal moveable coordinate space by @nakulnagargade in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16437
* feat: Phased development - Break down large requirements into phases by @NishidhJain in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16506
* Update gitsync cypress config by @ajith-k-v in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16603
* Perf: fix module version loading causing pool exhaustion on apps with many branches by @kavinvenkatachalam in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16580
* Enhance container and form components with overflow hidden style; adjust resize handle position in form.scss by @nakulnagargade in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16384
* fix: codeHinter - expose getData/getRawData/getloadingState in query suggestions by @shaurya-sharma064 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16349
* chore: bump version to 3.20.169-lts across all components by @johnsoncherian in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16607
* fix: AppBuilder - fall back to labelWidth when resolving form input height by @shaurya-sharma064 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16609
* Feature: Auto-commit app deletion to git on feature branches by @vjaris42 in https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16560
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/compare/v3.21.37-beta...v3.21.38-beta
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ToolJet/ToolJet release v3.21.38-beta, the release includes adding 'Auto' sorting option and updating setSort logic, fixes on table sort functionality, custom header click events and programmatic sorting on Table, fixing a QuickBooks bug, fixing queries not running inside modules successfully on released apps, version update to 3.20.166-lts, fixing dynamic-height to treat offsetHeight=0 as not measurable on show, enhancing end-user and builder access to modules and data queries, adding support for Gemini, adding snapshot_groups variable to Packer configuration, implementing parent remapping for version copying in create service, fixing Modal moveable coordinate space, phased development support, updating gitsync cypress config, fixing module version loading causing pool exhaustion on apps with many branches, enhancing container and form components with overflow hidden style and adjusting resize handle position, fixing codeHinter to expose getData/getRawData/getloadingState in query suggestions, version bump to 3.20.169-lts, fixing AppBuilder to fall back to labelWidth when resolving form input height, and auto-commit app deletion to git on feature branches.

chunks.title: v3.20.170-lts
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: ToolJet/ToolJet
Release: v3.20.170-lts
Tag: v3.20.170-lts; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-06-01T12:26:54Z; created_at: 2026-06-01T11:58:12Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
### 🛠️ Fixes
* Addressed Snyk security vulnerabilities by executing necessary dependency updates, applying an SSRF default-on safety posture, and upgrading the core Docker base image by @adishM98 in [#16600](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16600)
* Fixed a validation bug causing an infinite parent-child cyclic loop inside components by @shaurya-sharma064 in [#16490](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16490)
* Fixed AppBuilder form height resolution layout issue by falling back to `labelWidth` appropriately by @shaurya-sharma064 in [#16609](https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/pull/16609)
Full Changelog: https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet/compare/v3.20.169-lts...v3.20.170-lts
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ToolJet/ToolJet release v3.20.170-lts, the release includes fixes to address Snyk security vulnerabilities by executing necessary dependency updates, applying an SSRF default-on safety posture, and upgrading the core Docker base image; fixing a validation bug causing an infinite parent-child cyclic loop inside components; and fixing AppBuilder form height resolution layout issue by falling back to labelWidth appropriately.

questions.query_text: In the ToolJet/ToolJet releases, which release introduces the new AI Module Builder?

answer_support.answer_text: introduces the new AI Module Builder

questions.query_text: Across the ToolJet/ToolJet releases, how does the feature set in v3.20.155-lts differ from that in v3.20.157-lts?

options.text: v3.20.155-lts introduces OAuth support for Dynamic Forms and a Context Window widget, while v3.20.157-lts adds QuickBooks Online marketplace plugin support and search functionality for gRPC methods.
v3.20.155-lts adds AI datasource support for Snowflake, while v3.20.157-lts adds Intercom marketplace plugin.
Both releases only contain bug fixes with no new features.
v3.20.155-lts removes the Table component, while v3.20.157-lts restores it.

questions.expected_answer: v3.20.155-lts introduces OAuth support for Dynamic Forms and a Context Window widget, while v3.20.157-lts adds QuickBooks Online marketplace plugin support and search functionality for gRPC methods.

answer_support.answer_text: OAuth support for Dynamic Forms, a new Context Window widget
QuickBooks Online marketplace plugin support and search functionality for gRPC methods and service names

questions.query_text: In the ToolJet/ToolJet release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds AI datasource support for MySQL and MSSQL, (2) a release that introduces the new AI Module Builder, (3) a release that adds AI datasource support for Snowflake, (4) a release that adds native support for Gemini AI.

answer_support.answer_text: introduces the new AI Module Builder
AI datasource support for MySQL and MSSQL
